subcodes.first_line: Verily, the call hath been raised between earth and heaven. Blessed is the ear that hath hearkened unto it, the tongue that hath answered it
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع الندآء بین الارض و السماء طوبی لاذن فازت و للسان اجاب و لقلب اقبل و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude
